utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final coverage plan: all five of these items are present. Each one is fully specified—health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs (monthly_cost 275); property_coverage includes home/contents insurance, though cost is not explicitly separated but represented indirectly in total_budget; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with clear benefits; additional_services includes enhancement services with details; total_budget has full monthly and annual cost breakdown. All required elements are covered and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes a combined health insurance called 'Global Elite Integration Bundle1' covering both physical and mental health, property coverage, and travel coverage, plus additional concierge and global support services. To determine ratings, we need to match each selected component to the most similar ground-truth options. The 'Global Elite Integration Bundle1' integrates both physical and mental health coverage, likely corresponding to the 'EliteCare Premium Plan' for both physical and mental health (both rated 10). The property coverage section includes electronics, liability, accommodation, and natural disaster protection — these features align best with 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage includes comprehensive benefits like medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection, and emergency coordination, aligning with the 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). Additional services such as concierge, dedicated agent, and 24/7 global support align with 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10). The included wellness programs and telemedicine also correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 9) and 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 9).
